name: Charta Dungeon - Ambidextrous
short_description: A deck-building Roguelike game! Fuse hundreds of skill cards with poker hands, wield myriad joker cards, and forge an unbreakable legacy. Brave treacherous paths, outsmart relentless foes, and rise as the ultimate card master in a shattered world!
detailed_description:
In this poker-driven Roguelike card game inspired by Slay the Spire and Balatro, as a deck master, you’ll weave skill cards and poker hands to defeat randomized enemies, unlock powerful synergies, and unravel the secrets of the Calamity. Every draw shapes your destiny!

Core Gameplay

  • Deck-Building Mastery

    Begin with a humble deck of skills and poker cards, evolving into a masterful arsenal. Enhance your skill cards with devastating effects, refine poker hands for maximum impact, and harness mischievous joker cards or fleeting consumables to turn the tide. Each choice—whether amplifying a combo-focused Mage or fortifying a Vampire’s bloodthirsty arsenal—builds a legacy to withstand the apocalypse’s wrath.

  • Dynamic Poker-Powered Battles

    Wield a vibrant array of heroines, each with distinct skills: summon nature’s wrath as the Elf Princess, orchestrate tactical strikes as the Commander, or embrace dark blood magic as the Vampire. Play poker hands—straights, flushes, or full houses—to fuel skill cards, with chips multiplied by hand strength determining your attack power. Adapt to cunning enemies that disrupt your draws or debuff your suits, and seize victory through calculated risks and explosive combos!

  • Faction Synergies & Path Choices

    Forge alliances with other heroines, blending their unique cards into your deck for unparalleled strategies—but beware, as new powers dilute your core strength. Chart your journey through branching maps, each path offering distinct challenges: battle fierce bosses in gothic crypts, uncover rare cards in desolate wastelands, or risk treacherous shortcuts for greater rewards. Every choice shapes your saga in this ever-shifting Roguelike odyssey.
